zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Ogle於大約1410年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可利時，她的父親Robert Ogle32歲，母親Margaret Grey30歲。她於1420年與Sir Matthew Whitfield在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1491年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德懷特菲爾德享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Ogle于大约1410年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可利时，她的父亲Robert Ogle32岁，母亲Margaret Grey30岁。她于1420年与Sir Matthew Whitfield在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1491年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德懷特菲爾德享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Ogle was born about 1410, in Kirkley, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Ogle, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Grey, was 30. She married Sir Matthew Whitfield in 1420, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1491, in Whitfield, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Ogle est née environ 1410, à Kirkley, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ogle, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Matthew Whitfield en 1420, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1491, à Whitfield, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

Sie hat 1420 in England, United Kingdom Sir Matthew Whitfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Ogleが約1410年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクリーで生まれた時，父Robert Ogleは32歳，母Margaret Greyは30歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスでSir Matthew Whitfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1491年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウィトフィールドで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Ogle(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ogle(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Matthew Whitfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 휘트필드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Ogle родилась около 1410 г. в местности киркли, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Ogle было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grey, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Matthew Whitfield в 1420 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1491 г. в местности уитфиелд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
